## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New component
- [ ] 🔧 Enhancement to existing component
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/design change
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor

## Component(s) Affected

List the component(s) this PR modifies or adds.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds cleanly (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Storybook builds cleanly (`npm run build-storybook`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Component has full TypeScript types
- [ ] Component uses SCSS module with CSS custom properties (no hardcoded colors)
- [ ] Component is accessible (aria attributes, keyboard navigation)
- [ ] Component is responsive
- [ ] Component works in light, dark, and system themes
- [ ] Storybook story is included with all props as controls
- [ ] README updated (if adding a new component)

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots showing the component in light and dark themes.

Describe how reviewers can test this change.
